channel.title: PII Detection on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in PII Detection on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Public Preview: Conversational PII NextGen Playground in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft Foundry has added a public preview Conversational PII NextGen Playground. It accepts transcript input and includes an API Configuration Panel so developers can validate PII detection in multi-speaker dialogue before integration.

  • Source: Azure Updates
